productDisplayName: Fusion Beats Women Dark Pink Tunic
description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tunics, kurtas and kurtis that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with solid leggings and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product Details Dark pink tunic, has a bucket neckline with embroidery around it, embroidery on the chest and below the neckline at the back, short sleeves with embroidery at the cuffs and embroidery on the front hem Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
